title: Python product runtime source generation

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Workspace, planning, and memory product-specific executable runtime modules are generated target output under generated/python from IR/contracts and codegen-owned primitives; packages/command-generation/src owns only generic generator, renderer, executor, schema, freshness, and conformance machinery.
proof_expectations: uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py src/agentic_workspace/contract_tooling.py
completion_criteria: Static proof rejects full Python completion while packages/command-generation/src contains product-specific executable runtime modules such as workspace_runtime_cli.py, planning_runtime_cli.py, or memory_runtime_cli.py; regenerated Python outputs provide the executable projection and black-box/Docker conformance passes.

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.

completion_criteria: Static proof rejects full Python completion while packages/command-generation/src contains product-specific executable runtime modules such as workspace_runtime_cli.py, planning_runtime_cli.py, or memory_runtime_cli.py; regenerated Python outputs provide the executable projection and black-box/Docker conformance passes.

execution_run.what happened: Added python_runtime_projection_inventory as a schema-backed contract, converted planning_operation_ir_executor.py into a command-generation render_outputs artifact, then converted memory_operation_ir_executor.py and workspace_operation_ir_executor.py into generated operation-executor wrappers driven by command_package_ir python_runtime_binding.operation_executor metadata. The latest planning runtime slice moved planning.summary.report and planning.reconcile.report into generated operation files and planning_operation_ir_executor execution. Docker proof also exposed and fixed #982 by adding a no-git fallback for source-retirement scanning, #987 by excluding host Python bytecode caches from Docker build context, #990 by pinning generated conformance subprocess terminal dimensions, and #991 by rejecting generated operation resources that only have legacy steps without executable ir_plan.
execution_run.scope touched: Runtime projection inventory, command_package_ir/schema binding metadata, command-generation renderer, generated workspace/planning/memory operation executor outputs, generated planning operation resources, generated package metadata projections, generated package checker Docker fallback, root Docker ignore, focused tests, and planning state.
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; make test-planning; make lint-planning; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace.
execution_run.result for continuation: workspace_operation_ir_executor.py, planning_operation_ir_executor.py, and memory_operation_ir_executor.py are now generated-owned and no longer block full completion; workspace/planning/memory runtime modules remain transitional generated-output debt.
execution_run.next step: Continue with planning_runtime_cli.py because it is the smallest remaining runtime module; only mark it rendered after remaining parser/text/prompt/runner behavior is generated or explicitly represented behind planning-owned contracts and generic codegen machinery.

finished_run_review.follow-on decision: continue current active lane; do not archive

delegation_outcome_feedback.expected savings: reused worker to inventory remaining hand-owned memory command surfaces while local route/sync migration proceeded
delegation_outcome_feedback.actual friction: worker inventory was produced after route and sync-memory were locally promoted, so those two rows became completed scope rather than remaining debt
delegation_outcome_feedback.proof result: memory route and sync-memory now have runtime-consumed operation contracts, generated package commands, generated operation artifacts, conformance registry entries, Python operation execution inventory entries, and passing package/static/Python conformance; full adapter conformance passed on rerun after the known intermittent native exit 3221225477
delegation_outcome_feedback.quality concern: memory_runtime_cli.py remains transitional generated-output debt and still owns lifecycle, prompt, current, route-review, note, search, verify-payload, and cleanup command behavior
delegation_outcome_feedback.decomposition adjustment: next memory slices should promote capture-note if already contracted, then route-review/search/verify read-only surfaces, before lifecycle mutations and runtime module rendering

proof_report.validation proof: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; make test-planning; make lint-planning; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: workspace_operation_ir_executor.py, planning_operation_ir_executor.py, and memory_operation_ir_executor.py appear in command-generation render_outputs; planning.summary.report and planning.reconcile.report now appear as generated planning operation resources and execute through planning_operation_ir_executor; generated package proof is clean; local/Docker generated Python conformance pass; TypeScript Docker conformance remains clean after the Docker ignore fix; python_runtime_projection_inventory marks only operation executors rendered-by-command-generation.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The slice prevents false completion, converts all tracked operation executor files to generator ownership, and reduces planning runtime command behavior by moving summary/reconcile through generated operation execution; it does not yet generate the remaining runtime files.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Runtime projection debt is explicit and proof-enforced; workspace_operation_ir_executor.py, planning_operation_ir_executor.py, and memory_operation_ir_executor.py are generated-owned; planning summary/reconcile now execute via generated operation IR; full lane remains open.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: generate, static proof, local Python conformance, Node-backed conformance, Python Docker conformance, TypeScript Docker proof/conformance, focused tests, contract tooling, structured inventory, and ruff passed

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: #982 generated Python Docker proof assumed git was installed
#980 planning handoff treated conceptual IR/contracts prose as a missing file reference
#987 generated CLI Docker conformance copied host Python bytecode caches
#990 generated CLI conformance depended on ambient terminal size
#991 operation generation allowed legacy steps without executable ir_plan
signals fixed: #982 fixed by adding a no-git fallback source-tree scan in check_generated_command_packages.py
#980 fixed by ignoring conceptual slash phrases with uppercase acronym segments such as IR/contracts in execplan file-reference scanning
#987 fixed by adding root Docker ignore rules for __pycache__, .pyc, and local cache/runtime directories
#990 fixed by setting deterministic COLUMNS and LINES in generated adapter conformance subprocesses
#991 fixed by adding explicit planning summary/reconcile ir_plan blocks and removing the permissive legacy steps fallback

issue_follow_up: #980 planning handoff false-positive file reference warning fixed in this branch
#982 generated Python Docker proof no-git fallback fixed in this slice
#987 generated CLI Docker conformance host bytecode cache leak fixed in this slice
#990 generated CLI conformance ambient terminal size dependency fixed in this slice
#991 generated operation legacy-steps no-op risk fixed in this slice

drift_log: 2026-05-15: Scaffolded by agentic-planning promote-to-plan from decomposition lane python-product-runtime-source-generation.

2026-05-15: Added schema-backed python_runtime_projection_inventory to distinguish generated/python placement from generated ownership; full completion remains blocked while entries are transitional-generated-output-debt.
2026-05-15: Generated planning_operation_ir_executor.py from command_package_ir operation_executor binding metadata and marked that inventory entry rendered-by-command-generation.
2026-05-15: Filed #982 for generated Python Docker proof assuming git, then fixed it with a no-git source scan fallback.
2026-05-15: Fixed #980 by ignoring conceptual uppercase slash phrases such as IR/contracts in planning handoff file-reference warnings.
2026-05-15: Generated memory_operation_ir_executor.py from command_package_ir operation_executor binding metadata; memory_runtime_cli.py remains blocking product-runtime debt.
2026-05-15: Filed #987 for Docker conformance copying host Python bytecode caches, then fixed it with root .dockerignore exclusions.
2026-05-15: Generated workspace_operation_ir_executor.py from command_package_ir operation_executor binding metadata; workspace_runtime_cli.py remains blocking product-runtime debt.
2026-05-15: Filed #990 for generated CLI conformance depending on ambient terminal size, then fixed it by setting deterministic COLUMNS/LINES in conformance subprocesses.

2026-05-15: Moved planning.summary.report and planning.reconcile.report into generated operation resources and planning_operation_ir_executor execution; planning_runtime_cli.py remains blocking runtime debt.
2026-05-15: Filed #991 for generated operation resources being emitted from legacy steps without executable ir_plan, then fixed the generator to require ir_plan.
